edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The Jersey crew formed from members of the disbanding Badami Newark family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Badami Newark family began to break apart, as many members joined the Gagliano-Lucchese family becoming the newly formed Jersey crew, while other members stayed with Gaspare D'Amico.

descriptions: Western Ave Little Locas was a historical street clique of Westside Locos.
edges.evidence_quote: Western Ave Little Locas

descriptions: Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariat-e-Mohammadi is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariat-e-Mohammadi

descriptions: Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariat-e-Mohammadi is a non-state ally of Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariat-e-Mohammadi

descriptions: TTP has a symbiotic relationship with TNSM.
edges.evidence_quote: There is clearly a symbiotic relationship between all of these different organizations: Al-Qaeda, the Pakistani Taliban, the Afghan Taliban, TNSM.

descriptions: TNSM claimed a suicide bombing on behalf of TTP.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariate-Mohammadi (TNSM) claimed responsibility for a 23 December 2007 suicide bombing targeting a military convoy on behalf of the TTP.

Bonde dos 13.description: Brazilian criminal faction based in Acre, founded around 2013 in the Rio Branco penitentiary complex. It is heavily involved in drug trafficking, especially along the Bolivia border, and is allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC). The group is engaged in a violent conflict with the Comando Vermelho (CV) for control of Amazonian drug routes. As of 2024, it operates in all municipalities of Acre.

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is in conflict with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 has rivalry with Ifara.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Ifara

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is allied with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC

descriptions: Comando Classe A is allied with B13.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: PCC financed B13 as a proxy against CV.
edges.evidence_quote: the PCC embarking on an aggressive expansion campaign by absorbing less organized gangs and financing local groups to operate as proxies against the CV across the country, such as the B13 gang in Acre

descriptions: Party of Reform and Development led by former Muslim Brotherhood member.
edges.evidence_quote: The Party of Reform and Development is led by Khaled al-Werchefani, a former member of the Muslim Brotherhood.

Latella 'ndrina.description: The Latella 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a criminal organization based in Reggio Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Pasquale Latella, it controls the Ravagnese and Croce Valanidi quarters. The clan has been involved in feuds and alliances, notably during the Second 'Ndrangheta war, and has expanded into construction and financial sectors. It remains active as of the 2010s.

descriptions: A member of the Ficara clan killed Vincenzo Barreca, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: sarà condannato all'ergastolo il killer Vincenzo Ficara della 'ndrina Ficara-Latella

descriptions: Barreca allied with Latella during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: Barreca was allied with Latella in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Libri, i Tegano, i Latella, i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca

descriptions: The Ficara-Latella 'ndrina attempted to approach the Pelle for prestige and power, indicating a cooperative approach.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 aprile 2010 si conclude l'operazione Reale che porta all'arresto di 8 persone, di cui 5 affiliate ai Pelle ... e 3 ai Ficara-Latella, che da come emerge dalle indagini, tentavano di avvicinarsi ai Pelle per ottenere maggior prestigio e più potere.

descriptions: Serraino and Latella were both implicated in Operation Araba Fenice.
edges.evidence_quote: I "colletti bianchi" arrestati sarebbero riconducibili alle famiglie Rosmini , Latella , Serraino, Audino e Nicolò .

descriptions: The Latella clan allied with the De Stefano clan during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina was an ally of De Stefano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Libri 'ndrina and Latella 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latella 'ndrina also known as Latella-Ficara 'ndrina is clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Latella allied with Audino in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

descriptions: In 2012, Ficara-Latella and Iamonte affiliates were arrested together.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 persone presunte affiliate ai Ficara-Latella e Iamonte

descriptions: Latella allied with Libri during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: joined the alliance with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri, Zindato

descriptions: Latella allied with Nicolò in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina collaborates with Pelle.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaboration with the De Stefano and Pelle 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella-Ficara collaborates with Pelle.
edges.evidence_quote: e in collaborazione con i De Stefano e i Pelle

descriptions: In 2010, Latella affiliates attempted to approach Pelle for prestige and power.
edges.evidence_quote: tentavano di avvicinarsi ai Pelle per ottenere maggior prestigio e più potere

descriptions: Latella allied with Rosmini in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

descriptions: Latella allied with Serraino in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

edges.evidence_quote: e in collaborazione con i De Stefano e i Pelle

edges.evidence_quote: joined the alliance with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri, Zindato

edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, The Latella 'ndrina was involved in a feud with Chilà-Ambrogio 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella-Ficara and Chilà-Ambrogio were in a feud in the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '80 sono coinvolti in una faida tra i Latella-Ficara e i Chilà-Ambrogio di Pellaro

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina collaborates with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaboration with the De Stefano and Pelle 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella allied with De Stefano-Tegano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Latella 'ndrina joined the alliance with the De Stefano-Tegano

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina participated in a meeting with Cosa Nostra representatives.
edges.evidence_quote: come rappresentante delle prime (in particolare i Tegano, Condello, Latella, Ficara, Serraino e Imerti) partecipò Giuseppe De Stefano e per i secondi Giuseppe e Filippo Graviano

'Ndrina Varacalli.description: The Varacalli are a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Ciminà, Italy. They operate in the Locride area and also in Turin, where they are active in drug trafficking. The family was involved in the Ciminà feud from 1966 to the 1980s, which resulted in about 50 deaths and extended to Turin.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Varacalli.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Varacalli and Franco were allied in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: The Varacalli are opposed to the Barillaro-Romano-Zucco family in the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida ha visto contrapposte da una parte le famiglie dei Barillaro-Romano-Zucco e dall'altra i Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo.

descriptions: Varacalli and Polifroni were allied in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: Varacalli and Spagnolo were allied in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

descriptions: The Varacalli are part of the Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo alliance in the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida ha visto contrapposte da una parte le famiglie dei Barillaro-Romano-Zucco e dall'altra i Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo.

descriptions: Barillaro and Varacalli were opposing sides in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Ciminà in cui vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra

Menace of Destruction.description: Hmong street gang founded in 1988 in Fresno, California, originally as Masters of Destruction. It is one of the oldest active Asian street gangs in Northern California and the largest Hmong gang in America, known for violence, drug trafficking, and weapon trafficking. Active in California, the Midwest, and other regions with Hmong communities. Recognized by the U.S. government as a criminal organization.

descriptions: Menace of Destruction is listed as an ally of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Menace of Destruction

descriptions: Big Circle Gang is allied with Menace of Destruction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Menace of Destruction

descriptions: Infobox lists Menace of Destruction as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Menace of Destruction

descriptions: Menace of Destruction is listed as an ally of La Familia Michoacana in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , La Nueva Familia Michoacana , Los Viagras , Menace of Destruction , Mara Salvatrucha , Beltrán-Leyva Cartel , Los Tequileros , Guerrero's Unidos , Juarez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas (Since 2004) , Rural Defense Force

descriptions: MOD was in dispute with Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the M.O.D was involved in a dispute with two other gangs; the Laotian Posse and the Alliance.

descriptions: MOD and Asian Crips were in a turf war.
edges.evidence_quote: M.O.D. and other Hmong gangs such as Asian Crips were involved in a turf war with each other, which resulted in more than 120 shootings in the area.

descriptions: MOD and Asian Family Gangsters were in conflict, with drive-by shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: During 1993 in Sacramento, California, tensions between the Menace of Destruction and the Asian Family Gangsters were intense.

descriptions: La Familia and MOD cooperated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel La Familia smuggled millions of dollars' worth of methamphetamine from Mexico to Minnesota. The drugs then went through a local member of the cartel and the Menace of Destruction gang.

descriptions: MOD was in dispute with Laotian Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: the M.O.D was involved in a dispute with two other gangs; the Laotian Posse and the Alliance.

descriptions: MOD and MBS both splintered from Peace MOD, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: the breakup of "Peace MOD" caused it to break into three gangs, including the "Masters of Destruction", the "Mongolian Boys Society" (MBS) and the "Oriental Ruthless Boys" (ORB).

descriptions: MOD and ORB both splintered from Peace MOD, and later had a confrontation in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: the breakup of "Peace MOD" caused it to break into three gangs, including the "Masters of Destruction", the "Mongolian Boys Society" (MBS) and the "Oriental Ruthless Boys" (ORB).

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Oroville Mono Boys ...

descriptions: MOD splintered from Peace MOD.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1988, a handful of Hmong youth broke off from one of the first Hmong gangs in California known as "Peace MOD", originally formed in 1985 in Fresno, California to combat other gangs preying upon the Hmong community. The splinter group formed the "Masters of Destruction" (MOD).

descriptions: Ruthless Crip Gangsters attacked a MOD member's home.
edges.evidence_quote: Several members of the Ruthless Crip Gangsters drove to the Eau Claire home of a member of the gang Menace of Destruction. Three to five shots were fired at a man after a verbal confrontation.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tiny Little Rascals

descriptions: MOD and Tiny Rascal Gang were in a turf war.
edges.evidence_quote: M.O.D members were migrating to the Midwestern states while having a turf war with Tiny Rascal Gang in Fresno, California.

descriptions: MOD overtook the White Tigers.
edges.evidence_quote: In the Midwest, one of Minnesota's first Hmong gang known as the White Tigers was eventually overtaken by MOD's presence in the Twin Cities.

edges.evidence_quote: operazione Tirreno ... che porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace , i Priolo e i Giuliano

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi founder attacked the rival Tanizaki-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: he was involved in an attack on the rival Tanizaki-gumi in September 1954

Fruit Town Piru.description: A set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance, based in Compton, California. Formed in the 1970s, it is named after fruit-named streets in its neighborhood. Known for its rivalry with the Mob Piru Bloods during the early 2000s, and has been involved in murders and feuds. The gang has affiliations with rappers such as Soulja Boy and Chris Brown.

Hornec gang.description: A Gitanes criminal group from the Paris region, led by three brothers from Montreuil. It controls racketeering, drug dealing, and illegal slot machines in Paris, with ties to the Corsican mafia and Maghrebian gangs. The gang rose after succeeding Claude Genova in 1994 but declined after arrests in 2006.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: Hornec family is listed as an ally of Gang de la Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

descriptions: Hornec gang has good connections with Corsican mafia, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: they have also good connections with the Corsican mafia

descriptions: Hornec gang has good connections with Maghrebian gangs, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: they have also good connections with the Corsican mafia , and the Maghrebian gangs.

descriptions: Los Escorpiones became the armed wing of the Gulf Cartel after the split with Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: After the rupture between the Gulf Cartel and Los Zetas (which until then had served as the cartel's armed wing), Los Escorpiones became the armed wing of the entire Gulf organization.

descriptions: Los Escorpiones is an armed wing of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: At the time of the separation with Los Zetas, Los Escorpiones took a more important role in the organization.

descriptions: The Gulf Cartel created Los Escorpiones as a criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: A lo largo de los años, el CDG creó grupos criminales como ... Los Escorpiones

descriptions: Cártel del Golfo created Los Escorpiones as a criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: A lo largo de los años, el CDG creó grupos criminales como Los Ciclones , Los Metros , Los Escorpiones , Los Rojos , Los Sierra o División Sierra , Los Ceros, Fuerzas Especiales Grupo Sombra (F.E.G.S.), Los Zetas , entre otros.

descriptions: Los Escorpiones is a subgroup within La Línea, which is part of Cártel de Juárez.
edges.evidence_quote: se conoce a un subgrupo dentro de esta organización conocido como “los Escorpiones”

descriptions: Los Ciclones and Los Escorpiones are presented as a single organization, two factions of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Ciclones - Escorpiones son una organización criminal , siendo dos de las cinco facciones principales del Cártel del Golfo

descriptions: Cártel del Noreste is a main enemy of Los Escorpiones.
edges.evidence_quote: teniendo como principales enemigos a Cártel del Noreste y Los Metros

descriptions: Los Escorpiones is a faction of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Ciclones - Escorpiones son una organización criminal , siendo dos de las cinco facciones principales del Cártel del Golfo

descriptions: Los Metros is a main enemy of Los Escorpiones.
edges.evidence_quote: teniendo como principales enemigos a Cártel del Noreste y Los Metros

descriptions: Los Escorpiones were created to confront Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: fueron creados después de una disputa entre dos de los principales líderes del CDG, Osiel Cárdenas Guillén y su hermano, Antonio Ezequiel alías "Tony Tormenta", sobre todo para hacerle frente a Los Zetas

descriptions: Los Metros are in a violent dispute with Los Escorpiones for control of the organization.
edges.evidence_quote: En la actualidad Los Metros sostienen una sangrienta disputa contra "Los Escorpiones", otro brazo armado del CDG que lucha para hacerse del control de la organanización.

descriptions: Athens Park Boys joined the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pirus, Black P. Stones, Athens Park Boys and other gangs not aligned with the Crips often clashed with them.

descriptions: Crips had disputes with Athens Park Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: sparking disputes with non-Crip gangs, including the L.A. Brims, Athens Park Boys, the Bishops, The Drill Company, and the Denver Lanes.

Soai-kai.description: The Soai-kai is a yakuza organization based in Chiba, Japan, formed in 1945 by Toramatsu Takahashi. Originally named the Gyosui-kai, it was renamed Takatora-gumi and later Soai-kai in 1955 when it became independent. It is a designated yakuza group with an estimated 80 active members and is one of the three dominant yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture.

descriptions: Matsuba-kai and Soai-kai are both members of the Kantō Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Matsuba-kai is a member of a yakuza fraternal federation named the Kantō Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kantō -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Toa-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Soai-kai and Inagawa-kai are both dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Headquartered in Ichihara, Chiba , the Soai-kai is one of the three dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture , along with the Sumiyoshi-kai and the Inagawa-kai .

descriptions: Soai-kai was originally an affiliate of Sasada-ikka, then became independent in 1955.
edges.evidence_quote: The Soai-kai was formed in 1945 by Toramatsu Takahashi, then a member of a Yokohama -based bakuto group named the Sasada-ikka. Originally named the "Gyosui-kai" ( 魚水会 ) as an affiliate of the Sasada-ikka, the group was renamed the "Takatora-gumi" ( 高寅組 ) and again renamed the Soai-kai in 1955 when the group became independent from the Sasada-ikka.

descriptions: Soai-kai and Sumiyoshi-kai are both dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Headquartered in Ichihara, Chiba , the Soai-kai is one of the three dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture , along with the Sumiyoshi-kai and the Inagawa-kai .

descriptions: Toa-kai and Soai-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Soai-kai is listed as an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

descriptions: Birger and the Shelton Brothers attacked the Klan in Herrin.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 1926, Charlie Birger and the Shelton Brothers joined forces to attack the remaining Klan leaders in Herrin, using Tommy guns and shotguns.

descriptions: The two gangs fought a war over bootlegging control starting in 1926.
edges.evidence_quote: By October 1926, the Birger and Shelton Gangs were in open conflict.

descriptions: Birger joined forces with the Shelton Brothers in 1920 to bootleg.
edges.evidence_quote: Birger initially based his operation in Harrisburg, southern Illinois . The law authorities in Saline County eventually persuaded him to leave, and he built a fortified speakeasy called Shady Rest just across the line in Williamson County .

descriptions: Oakland Hells Angels sponsored the South London chapter, establishing it as a charter.
edges.evidence_quote: the South London chapter was sponsored by the Hells Angels in Oakland

descriptions: Li Bergolis are allies of the Sinesi-Francavilla battery.
edges.evidence_quote: I clan predominanti sono i Li Bergolis di Monte Sant'Angelo (alleati della batteria foggiana dei Sinesi-Francavilla)

'Ndrina Gallace.description: The 'Ndrina Gallace is a powerful 'Ndrangheta clan originating from Guardavalle, Italy. Over the past 30 years, it has expanded its operations across Italy, including Tuscany, Lazio, Lombardy, and Rome. The clan is heavily involved in international drug trafficking, fraud, usury, and extortion. It has strong alliances with other 'Ndrangheta clans such as Farao-Marincola and Leuzzi.

descriptions: Novella mediated peace between Gallace and Crea di Siderno.
edges.evidence_quote: Carmelo Novella fece da paciere tra i Gallace e i Crea di Siderno invocando l'aiuto di Antonio Pelle.

descriptions: Gallace are among the major allies of Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono tra i maggiori alleati dei Farao-Marincola e delle 'ndrine sanlucote.

descriptions: Gallace sided with Loielo in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: dall'altra Nazzareno Salvatore Emanuele, legato alla 'ndrina dei Loielo, per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: Gallace are allied with Ruga di Monasterace.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Leuzzi di Stignano e dei Ruga di Monasterace.

descriptions: Gallace sided against Vallelunga in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1977 la tensione sale di nuovo tra le cosche esplose in un conflitto: la 'faida dei boschi', che vedeva da una parte la 'ndrina Vallelunga ... dall'altra ... per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: Gallace are among the major allies of the 'ndrine sanlucote.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono tra i maggiori alleati dei Farao-Marincola e delle 'ndrine sanlucote.

descriptions: Gallace are allied with Leuzzi di Stignano.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Leuzzi di Stignano e dei Ruga di Monasterace.

descriptions: The text groups Gallace and Ruga-Metastasio together as allies in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio-Novella-Vallelunga e i Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio

descriptions: Gallace have been in a feud with Vallelunga-Sia-Procopio since 2008.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2008 sono stati coinvolti in una faida di 'ndrangheta contro le 'ndrine dei Vallelunga - Sia-Procopio.

descriptions: Both 'ndrine were targeted together in the same police operation, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 luglio 2013 si conclude l'operazione Itaca-Freeboat contro esponenti dei Gallelli e dei Gallace di Guardavalle.

descriptions: Ruga are allied with Gallace-Novella.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei ... Gallace-Novella di Guardavalle

descriptions: Sia and Gallace were opposing sides in the Seconda faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 grazie all'operazione Confine , tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: The text states a feud (faida) between Sia and Gallace from 2008 to 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio-Novella-Vallelunga e i Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio

descriptions: The text initially states 'Ndrina Sia is allied with Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: È alleata dei ... i Gallace di Guardavalle

descriptions: The text states a feud between Procopio-Lentini and Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio-Novella-Vallelunga e i Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio

descriptions: Vallelunga and Gallace were opposing sides in the Seconda faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 grazie all'operazione Confine , tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: The text states a feud between Vallelunga and Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio-Novella-Vallelunga e i Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio

descriptions: Novella and Gallace were opposing sides in the Seconda faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 grazie all'operazione Confine , tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: The text states a feud between Novella and Gallace.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2010 è scoppiata una faida tra i Sia-Procopio-Novella-Vallelunga e i Gallace-Ruga-Metastasio

Kyosei-kai.description: The Kyosei-kai is a yakuza group based in Hiroshima, Japan, formed in May 1964 from seven yakuza clans united by bakuto Tatsuo Yamamura. It is known for its history of fierce conflicts with other yakuza groups, particularly the Yamaguchi-gumi, and is thought to be responsible for Hiroshima's 'town of violence' image. The group has been a leading member of anti-Yamaguchi federations and remains active.

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Kyosei-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyodo-kai is smaller than Kyosei-kai in the Chugoku region.
edges.evidence_quote: and is the second largest yakuza group in the Chugoku region after the Kyosei-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed Gosha-kai with Asano-gumi as a fellow member.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed Gosha-kai with Goda-ikka as a fellow member.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with other groups since 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai was a leading member of the Kansai Hatsuka-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kyosei-kai was a leading member of two anti-Yamaguchi federations, the Kansai Hatsuka-kai (formed in 1970)

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed Gosha-kai with Kyodo-kai as a fellow member.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai was a leading member of the Nishinippon Hatsuka-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: and the Nishinippon Hatsuka-kai (formed in 1989)

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed Gosha-kai with Shinwa-kai as a fellow member.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai has been in conflict with Yamaguchi-gumi since the early 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: Notably the Kyosei-kai has been in conflict with the Yamaguchi-gumi, the largest yakuza syndicate, since the early 1960s.

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Kyōsei-kai is listed as an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

X-Team.description: X-Team is a gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club, founded in Denmark in 1997 following the Nordic Biker War. Members are not required to own a motorcycle and act as a street gang recruiting young criminals to provide reinforcements for the Bandidos. They carry out crimes such as debt collection and drug dealing on behalf of the club. The gang had approximately 350 members at its peak in 2002 and operated in multiple countries, but the Danish branch was eventually disbanded.

descriptions: X-Team is affiliated with Bandidos in Finland.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups affiliated with the Bandidos in the country include the Diablos and X-Team .

descriptions: Bandidos and X-Team members were jointly charged in a drug trafficking case.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2008, two Bandidos and five X-Team members in Espoo were among twenty-one people charged with importing and distributing amphetamine.

descriptions: Bandidos are affiliated with X-Team in Norway.
edges.evidence_quote: The Norwegian Bandidos are affiliated with the Chicanos and X-Team

descriptions: Bandidos and X-Team members jointly committed violent extortion, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2015, a total of eight people, some of whom were members of the Bandidos and X-Team, were given prison sentences of various lengths for the violent extortion of a man in Oulu that took place in July 2014.

descriptions: Bandidos formed X-Team as a street gang to act as foot soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: In response to the changing criminal landscape, the Bandidos formed the X-Team, a street gang whose members act as the Bandidos' foot soldiers and carry out street-level crime.

descriptions: Black Cobra and X-Team are rivals per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels

descriptions: Black Jackets and X-Team are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: United Tribuns , Red Legions Stuttgart , AK81 , X-Team

descriptions: Diablos requested Bandidos to collect a debt, and X-Team members were involved in the subsequent extortion, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2015, a total of eight people, some of whom were members of the Bandidos and X-Team, were given prison sentences of various lengths for the violent extortion of a man in Oulu that took place in July 2014. According to the district court, the events originated when the Diablos chapter in Varkaus asked Bandidos' Oulu branch to collect the debt.

descriptions: Original Gangsters and X-Team had a violent conflict initiated by a night club quarrel.
edges.evidence_quote: Another conflict involved Original Gangsters and X-Team, a supporter club of Bandidos.

descriptions: X-Team is a support gang for the Bandidos, carrying out crimes on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: X-Team is a gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: An X-Team member attacked a Gremium MC member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 April 2012, an X-Team member used his car to force a member of the Gremium Motorcycle Club off the road near Westerkappeln.

descriptions: X-Team and Gårdstensalliansen fought over drug trade territory in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: A struggle for control of the drug trade in the Gårdsten and Lövgärdet areas of northeast Gothenburg between X-Team and the Gårdstensalliansen (Gårdstens Alliance) gang began in August 2008.

descriptions: Mexican Team Work is a successor youth branch formed by Bandidos after X-Team disbanded in Denmark.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos later former another youth branch called Mexican Team Work.

descriptions: X-Team and OGs engaged in a violent conflict in Gothenburg, Sweden.
edges.evidence_quote: X-Team has been involved in a conflict with the Original Gangsters (OGs) that was initiated by nightclub altercation... on 15 June 2002

descriptions: X-Team and Red & White Crew fought a gang war in Næstved and later in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: A gang war involving the X-Team and the Red & White Crew – the Hells Angels' equivalent of the X-Team – in Næstved broke out on 6 January 2002

descriptions: X-Team and Södertälje mafia fought a war over control of Södertälje's criminal market.
edges.evidence_quote: A conflict between Bernard 'Berno' Khouri, leader of the Södertälje mafia (Södertäljenätverket), and Dany Moussa, the founder of the X-Team in Södertälje, resulted in a war between the groups

Ozone Park Boys.description: The Ozone Park Boys are a Gambino crime family Mafia crew based in Ozone Park, Queens, New York City. Founded in the 1980s, they are known for a wide range of criminal activities including a $30 million-a-year sports gambling enterprise, auto theft, murder, and drug trafficking. The crew operated in New York City and South Florida, with Ronald Trucchio as a prominent leader in the 1990s. They remain active as of the present.

descriptions: The Ozone Park Boys are a crew of the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gambino crime family

descriptions: Ozone Park Boys are listed as allies of South Brooklyn Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Italian-American Mafia , Tanglewood Boys , Ozone Park Boys , Gallo Crew (early)

Zoe Pound.description: Criminal street gang based in Miami, Florida, founded by Haitian immigrants in 1990. Initially formed as a vigilante self-defense group against attacks on Haitian Americans, it evolved into a criminal organization involved in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, prostitution, and racketeering. The gang expanded across Florida and other states, with territory reaching as far as Virginia by 2006. In 2009, six leaders were arrested on racketeering charges.

descriptions: 400 Mawozo lists Zoe Pound as a rival in its infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Zoe Pound

descriptions: BMF listed Zoe Pound as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation (Gangster Disciples, Black Disciples, Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras, Maniac Latin Disciples, Imperial Gangsters, Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals, etc), Crips, Zoe Pound, etc.

descriptions: Zoe Pound is listed as an ally of BMF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation ( Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , Imperial Gangsters , Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals , etc), Crips , Zoe Pound , etc.

descriptions: Zoe Pound is listed as an ally of Hidden Valley Kings in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound

descriptions: Zoe Pound is listed as an ally of No Limit Soldiers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Colombian cartels , Penose , Yardies , Zoe Pound

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
descriptions: Zoe Pound is listed as an ally of G9 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound , Zoe Nation, Zoe Mafia Family

descriptions: Zoe Pound is allied with Black Mafia Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Mafia Family , Bloods , and Crips

descriptions: Zoe Pound is allied with Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Mafia Family , Bloods , and Crips

descriptions: Zoe Pound expanded after the decline of Boogie Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Zoe Pound took advantage of the power vacuum caused by their sudden decline

descriptions: Zoe Pound is allied with Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Mafia Family , Bloods , and Crips

descriptions: Zoe Pound has Hells Angels as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sapp Boys, MS-13 , and Hells Angels

descriptions: Zoe Pound expanded after the decline of John Does.
edges.evidence_quote: Zoe Pound took advantage of the power vacuum caused by their sudden decline

descriptions: Zoe Pound has MS-13 as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sapp Boys, MS-13 , and Hells Angels

descriptions: Zoe Pound has Sapp Boys as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sapp Boys, MS-13 , and Hells Angels
